HEAT-SHRINKABLE TUBING (WCSM)
HEAVY LOW VOLTAGE INSULATION AND OUTER SEALING TUBINGS
KEY FEATURES TE Connectivity’s (TE) Raychem WCSM heat-shrinkable heavy-wall tubing is
designed for insulation on Low voltage cable accessories and applications,
• Excellent electrical
as well as for sealing and protection on low, medium and high voltage
characteristics and
cables and accessories. In this tubing type, the electrical and physical
mechanical strength for
properties of cable oversheath and core insulation of low voltage cables are
low voltage applications
combined with ruggedness and easy installation.
• Material formulation
On heating, TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing recovers to the original smaller
ensures top end
diameter, fitting tightly over a wide range of cable sizes and accessories
performance
because of its high shrink ratio. At the same time the tubing’s inner sealant
• Material hardness wall gives a reliable moisture seal over the most irregular shapes.
increased
TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing mechanical strength enables immediate back-
• Halogen-free material filling of cable trenches after jointing. Widely used to insulate, protect and
content, non-corrosive, seal power cable joints, accessories and electrical connections, it is one
non-toxic result of our extensive capability in materials technology.
• Silicon-free material
Shelf-life restrictions usually associated with tapes or resins or cold-applied
content, no disturbance
products do not apply and the completed installation may be taken into
of coating equipment
service at once. TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing is fast and easily installed and
has proven its long term reliability in harsh climatic conditions and polluted
• Compliant to RoHS and
environments.
REACH regulations
• Stabilized against UV
Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s
proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support.

images.context_text: HEAT-SHRINKABLE TUBING (WCSM) HEAVY LOW VOLTAGE INSULATION AND OUTER SEALING TUBINGS KEY FEATURES TE Connectivity’s (TE) Raychem WCSM heat-shrinkable heavy-wall tubing is designed for insulation on Low voltage cable accessories and applications, • Excellent electrical as well as for sealing and protection on low, medium and high voltage characteristics and cables and accessories. In this tubing type, the electrical and physical mechanical strength for properties of cable oversheath and core insulation of low voltage cables are low voltage applications combined with ruggedness and easy installation. • Material formulation On heating, TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing recovers to the original smaller ensures top end diameter, fitting tightly over a wide range of cable sizes and accessories performance because of its high shrink ratio. At the same time the tubing’s inner sealant • Material hardness wall gives a reliable moisture seal over the most irregular shapes. increased TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing mechanical strength enables immediate back- • Halogen-free material filling of cable trenches after jointing. Widely used to insulate, protect and content, non-corrosive, seal power cable joints, accessories and electrical connections, it is one non-toxic result of our extensive capability in materials technology. • Silicon-free material Shelf-life restrictions usually associated with tapes or resins or cold-applied content, no disturbance products do not apply and the completed installation may be taken into of coating equipment service at once. TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing is fast and easily installed and has proven its long term reliability in harsh climatic conditions and polluted • Compliant to RoHS and environments. REACH regulations • Stabilized against UV Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support. In this tubing type, the electrical and physical mechanical strength for properties of cable oversheath and core insulation of low voltage cables are low voltage applications combined with ruggedness and easy installation. • Material formulation On heating, TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing recovers to the original smaller ensures top end diameter, fitting tightly over a wide range of cable sizes and accessories performance because of its high shrink ratio. At the same time the tubing’s inner sealant • Material hardness wall gives a reliable moisture seal over the most irregular shapes. increased TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing mechanical strength enables immediate back- • Halogen-free material filling of cable trenches after jointing. Widely used to insulate, protect and content, non-corrosive, seal power cable joints, accessories and electrical connections, it is one non-toxic result of our extensive capability in materials technology. • Silicon-free material Shelf-life restrictions usually associated with tapes or resins or cold-applied content, no disturbance products do not apply and the completed installation may be taken into of coating equipment service at once. TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing is fast and easily installed and has proven its long term reliability in harsh climatic conditions and polluted • Compliant to RoHS and environments. In this tubing type, the electrical and physical mechanical strength for properties of cable oversheath and core insulation of low voltage cables are low voltage applications combined with ruggedness and easy installation. • Material formulation On heating, TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing recovers to the original smaller ensures top end diameter, fitting tightly over a wide range of cable sizes and accessories performance because of its high shrink ratio. At the same time the tubing’s inner sealant • Material hardness wall gives a reliable moisture seal over the most irregular shapes. increased TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing mechanical strength enables immediate back- • Halogen-free material filling of cable trenches after jointing. Widely used to insulate, protect and content, non-corrosive, seal power cable joints, accessories and electrical connections, it is one non-toxic result of our extensive capability in materials technology. • Silicon-free material Shelf-life restrictions usually associated with tapes or resins or cold-applied content, no disturbance products do not apply and the completed installation may be taken into of coating equipment service at once. REACH regulations • Stabilized against UV Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support. Heat-Shrinkable Tubing WCSM
TESTING
Physical Characteristic Test Method Material Requirements
Tensile Strength ISO 37 12 MPa min
Ultimate Elongation ISO 37 350% min
Density ISO 1183 Method A 0.8-1.0 g/cm³ WCSM tubing - coated with
Hardness ISO 868 ≥ 45 shore D hot melt adhesive /S
Accelerated ageing WCSM-12/3-1000/S(S20)
7 days at 150°C ± 2°C WCSM-16/4-1000/S(S20)
Tensile Strength ISO 37 12 MPa min
Ultimate Elongation ISO 37 350% min WCSM-24/6-1000/S(S20)
WCSM-34/8-1000/S(S10)
Low Temperature Flexibility ASTM D2671 Procedure C No cracking at 4 hours at -40°C ± 3°C
WCSM-48/12-1000/S(S10)
Dielectric Strength IEC 60243 part 1 and 2 ≥ 10 kV/mm min.
WCSM-56/16-1000/S(S10)
Volume Resistivity IEC 60093 1 x 1010 Ω cm min
WCSM-70/20-1000/S(S5)
Dielectric Constant IEC 60250 5.0 max
WCSM-90/25-1000/S(S5)
Water Absorption ISO 62 method 1 ≤ 0.25% max after 14 days at 23°C ± 2°C
WCSM-110/30-1000/S(S5)
Weathering The material from which WCSM is manufactured contains carbon black
(≥ 2,5 %) to protect it from ultra-violet light WCSM-130/35-1000/S(S5)
Application Characteristics WCSM-160/50-1000/S(S5)
Operating temperature range - 40°C up to + 100°C (coated) WCSM-180/50-1000/S(S5)
Installation/ shrinking temp > 120°C WCSM-200/50-1000/S(C20)
Low temperatures flexibility down to - 40°C WCSM-250/65-1000/S(S5)
Shrink ratio > 3 : 1 WCSM-320/95-1000/S(C50)
Longitudinal shrinkage free recovered ≤ - 10 % WCSM-385/110-1000/S(S50)
For other available lengths please
Characteristics at a glance Applications in
contact your local TE sales rep.
• Cross-linked polyolefin, Thick wall • Low voltage insulation
• Available inline coated with Hot melt adhesive • Protection against moisture and pressure Delivery on spool up to size
110/30 on request. Sizes 320/95 and
• Color black, shrinkage ratio 3 : 1 • Mechanical protection 385/110 in uncoated version on request.
• Resistant to chemical agents • Corrosion protection
• Stabilized against UV rays (with approved sealing materials only)
• Halogen-free, non-corrosive, free of lead and aluminium
• High tensile strength and mechanical robustness
• Suitable for heat-shrink applications, approved for
marine, offshore and shipbuilding applications

WCSM- 56/16 17,5 50 56 16 1 4,4
WCSM- 70/20 22 63 70 20 1 4,4
WCSM- 90/25 27 81 90 25 1 4,3
WCSM- 110/30 33 100 110 30 1 4,3
WCSM- 130/35 38 118 130 35 1 4,3
WCSM- 160/50 55 144 160 50 1 4,3
WCSM- 180/50 55 162 180 50 1 4,3
WCSM- 200/50 55 180 200 50 1 4,3
WCSM- 250/65 70 225 250 65 1 4,3
WCSM- 320/95 * 105 295 320 95 1,1 4,3
WCSM- 385/110 * 125 350 385 110 1,1 4,3
* Available coated and uncoated; all other sizes available coated only
Standard Lengths: All sizes are available in the standard lengths 1000 mm. On request, other lengths and on spools.
All lengths subject to standard cutting tolerances. TE’s Raychem WCSM tubing is available coated with an inner sealant wall.
The sealant exhibits excellent bonding and sealing characteristics to all materials commonly used in the various cable insulation
and sheath constructions, such as plastic, rubber, lead, and aluminium.
